name: AutoDirectionTypeAttribute
summary: The AutoDirectionTypeAttribute class is used for storing the auto direction type. Based on the type the system will then calculate the up direction of the connection/detail if the "Auto" up direction is chosen in the dialog. The attribute is initialized from the custom attribute [AutoDirectionType(AutoDirectionTypeEnum.AUTODIR_DETAIL)] in the connection/detail source.

constructors.name: AutoDirectionTypeAttribute(Int32)
constructors.summary: The custom attribute [AutoDirectionType()] uses this to store the auto direction type to the system. This is not to be used by itself.

constructors.name: AutoDirectionTypeAttribute(AutoDirectionTypeEnum)
constructors.summary: The custom attribute [AutoDirectionType()] uses this to store the auto direction type to the system. This is not to be used by itself.

properties.name: Type
properties.summary: The custom attribute [AutoDirectionType()] uses this to store the auto direction type to the system. This is not to be used by itself.
